title: Sandal 3-3 Eau de Parfum, 100ml – Unisex Inspired Fragrance, Long Lasting Scent

amazon_product_details_section.Delivery information: : We cannot deliver certain products outside mainland UK ( Details). We will only be able to confirm if this product can be delivered to your chosen address when you enter your delivery address at checkout.

features: Inspired Signature Scent – Sandal 3-3 captures the woody, spicy and leathery essence of a modern cult classic, re-imagined in an affordable way.
Unisex Eau de Parfum – Designed for both men and women, with a perfectly balanced fragrance profile.
Premium Concentration – Eau de Parfum strength for a longer-lasting scent that stays noticeable throughout the day.
Distinctive Woody Notes – Sandalwood and cedar blend with cardamom, leather, and musk for a unique fragrance character.
Modern Aromatic Style – A minimalist yet bold perfume that makes an impression in any season.
Generous 100ml Bottle – Excellent value, giving you a long supply of your favourite fragrance.

specifications_table.Scent Name: A woody, spicy, smoky unisex scent — dry sandalwood & cedar are dominant, softened by powdery iris/violet and given warmth by leather, musk, and amber. Cardamom at the top gives a fresh-spicy kick.
